prose.en: Assessors MUST satisfy all American Association for Laboratory Accreditation (A2LA) re-entry conditions before regaining FedRAMP Recognition after revocation.

https://ns.fedramp.gov/cr26/facet/narrat.note: A revocation may require extended time in revoked status while the assessor demonstrates acceptable performance in the A2LA Cybersecurity Inspection Body Program before seeking FedRAMP Recognition again.
